infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TrackMe LK needs your location to provide real-time tracking for personal safety and delivery services.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TrackMe LK needs continuous access to your location to track your journey and ensure your safety even when the app is in the background.
